---
name: Finding
about: A bug, inconsistency, gap, or production-readiness concern
title: "<area>: <one-line summary>"
labels: []
---

## Severity

<!-- Critical / High / Medium / Low — and one line on why. -->

## Where

<!-- File(s), function(s), and line(s). Link code where possible. -->

## Problem

<!-- What is wrong: the bug, inconsistency, missing behaviour, or risk.
     For a bug, give a concrete trigger (inputs/state -> wrong outcome). -->

## Impact

<!-- Who/what is affected and how bad it is: data loss, security, correctness,
     scalability, operability. State whether it is reachable in a default config. -->

## Suggested fix / options

<!-- One or more approaches. If it is a design decision, list the trade-offs and,
     if you have one, a recommendation. -->

## Context

<!-- Origin (PR that introduced it, related issue), any prior discussion, and
     anything that would help someone pick this up cold. -->
